allow: Bash(ls trade_executor/state/status/20260312-005*.filled.json 2>/dev/null; cat trade_executor/state/results/20260312-005.json 2>/dev/null || echo "no result file"; ls trade_executor/state/status/20260312-005*.clientids.json 2>/dev/null | xargs cat 2>/dev/null)
